creator: freebsd@moosefs.com
text:
I'd like to add, that we have Git(Hub) repo with most recent ports:

https://github.com/moosefs/FreeBSD-ports

I added in two ports (moosefs-cli and moosefs-netdump) a change (apart form changes with new manuals, sha256sum of new sources tarball, etc.): removed "PLIST_FILES" from Makefile and added list of these files in pkg-plist (latest 2 commits on GitHub). I'd like you to commit this in such way, because it is consistent with files in sources tarball (folder named "freebsd").

All diffs (in this bug and in 207704, 207706, 207707, 207708) are between FreeBSD current ports tree (/usr/ports/systutils/moosefs-*) and our Git ports repo.
